title: Steve Buccellato
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Steve Buccellato''' is a [[Star Wars comic books|comic-book]] letterer and colorist. He worked on the ''[[Classic Star Wars]]'' series as collected in ''[[Classic Star Wars Volume 1: In Deadly Pursuit]]'', ''[[Classic Star Wars Volume 2: The Rebel Storm]]'' and ''[[Classic Star Wars Volume 3: Escape to Hoth]]''. He also worked on [[Marvel Comics]] series [[Wikipedia:X-Men|X-Men]].

{{Bio-stub}}

*''[[Classic Star Wars Volume 1: In Deadly Pursuit]]''
